mapper.select:
SELECT ID, DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, SERIAL_NUMBER, INVOICE_PREPAY_ID, INVOICE_PREPAY_NO, SYS_INVOICE_PREPAY_NO, "TYPE", INVOICE_PREPAY_AMOUNT, DEBTORPAY_PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, DEBTORPAY_PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, FILE_NO, FILE_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_FD_DEBTORPAYMENT_DETAIL
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_DEBTORPAYMENT_DETAIL( ID, DEBTORPAYMENT_ID, SERIAL_NUMBER, INVOICE_PREPAY_ID, INVOICE_PREPAY_NO, SYS_INVOICE_PREPAY_NO, "TYPE", INVOICE_PREPAY_AMOUNT, DEBTORPAY_PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE, DEBTORPAY_PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, FILE_NO, FILE_TIME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{debtorpaymentId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{serialNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoicePrepayId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoicePrepayNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sysInvoicePrepayNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoicePrepayAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{debtorpayPaymentTypeCode, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{debtorpayPaymentTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentMethodCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentMethodName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_DEBTORPAYMENT_DETAIL SET DEBTORPAYMENT_ID = #{debtorpaymentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SERIAL_NUMBER = #{serialNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_PREPAY_ID = #{invoicePrepayId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, INVOICE_PREPAY_NO = #{invoicePrepayNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYS_INVOICE_PREPAY_NO = #{sysInvoicePrepayNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, "TYPE" = #{type,jdbcType=BIGINT}, INVOICE_PREPAY_AMOUNT = #{invoicePrepayAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, DEBTORPAY_PAYMENT_TYPE_CODE = #{debtorpayPaymentTypeCode,jdbcType=BIGINT}, DEBTORPAY_PAYMENT_TYPE_NAME = #{debtorpayPaymentTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE = #{paymentMethodCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME = #{paymentMethodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FILE_NO = #{fileNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FILE_TIME = #{fileTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select HAS_NOT_RECEIPT_AMOUNT,id,ELIMINATE_AMOUNT "invoicePrepayAmount" from T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL WHERE ID IN
#{item.invoicePrepayId}

select HAS_NOT_RECEIPT_AMOUNT,id,INVOICE_AMOUNT "invoicePrepayAmount" from T_FD_INVOICE WHERE ID IN
#{item.invoicePrepayId}
